headline: Fifth Third Bancorp Announces Preliminary Results of Annual Shareholders Meeting
summary: CINCINNATI, April 21, 2026--Fifth Third Bancorp (Nasdaq: FITB) has announced that preliminary results from the Annual Shareholders Meeting held earlier today have indicated the following directors were re-elected:

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Fifth Third Bancorp, Raises Price Target to $53
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $51 to $53.
